title: Create: More Farmables
description: A Create Addon that brings full automation to More Items, More Blocks, More Fluids, More Mods
body:
![CMF logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4d533248c1956694336130fa18dddc4448d3ba25.png)
### A [Create](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create) Addon that brings full automation to More Items, More Blocks, More Fluids, More Mods
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Dyed Water
![DyedWater](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e51ace79225aa131d9c366e9dce44c34180d4cd9.png)

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Items

Shulker Compound

Shulker shell fragment

Dyed Water buckets, dye template -

![dyed buckets and dye template](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/56c262ff0fbe1e8534b6560b6b1bac42ae8d7a12.png)

You can only make dyed water using [Create](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create) machinery

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Recipes

heated mixing: stone + blue dyed water -> Asurine

Better chance of Crushed Raw zinc/zinc nuggets from crushing Asuruine

heated mixing: stone + red dyed water -> Crimsite

Better chance of Crushed Raw Iron/Iron nuggets from crushing Crimsite

heated mixing: Dripstone block + yellow dyed water -> Ochrum

Better chance of Crushed Raw Gold/Gold nuggets from crushing Ochrum

heating mixing: stone + white dyed water -> calcite

heated mixing: cobblestone + green dyed water -> Veridium

haunting andesite -> netherrack

![Dyed Water recipe Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5158d04d3448486dedb1c19e0c07ca6f4d4226df.png)

![Dyed water to dye example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/07ce42c07dbab3d3833831582b829de92fcdf30e.png)

![Dye template recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e5fdbd96ed5e01cdbab004a3d7b79d4656e6c108.png)

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### FAQ

**Will you port to 1.XX.X version?**

~~I don't plan to port to any version below 1.20.1~~

plans changed :)

**Can i use your mod in my mod pack?**

You can freely use my mod in modpacks, its meant for use in modpacks large or small to add automation. Use it however you please.

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------


Still in beta as of right now, and there is still plenty that i could add & change

Report bugs [Here](https://github.com/Rockiecraft/Create-More-Farmables/issues)

### issues:

[Rubidium](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/rubidium) & [Sodium](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/sodium) changing colors of dyed water:

Both mods messes with custom fluids that are hardcoded to be a certain color. 

 Alternative to Rubidium/Sodium if you want the correct color of the custom fluids:

[Embeddium](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/embeddium) 

just more compatibility and less bugs than rubidium. plus the dev is constantly working on it fixing more bugs.
